commitExpectation: one controller commit after the accepted attempt
forbidden: reusing the attempt-1 report path for attempt 2
stop_condition: attempt 1 fails and its report is preserved; attempt 2 uses a distinct report path and the same baseline; acceptedAttempt=2
human_checks: confirm the attempt-1 report is unchanged after attempt 2
confirm attempt 2 uses a distinct report path
confirm the baseline path is identical across attempts
